variables.locations: [concat(createArray(createObject('locationName', parameters('location'), 'failoverPriority', 0, 'isZoneRedundant', false())), if(not(equals(parameters('secondaryLocation'), '')), createArray(createObject('locationName', parameters('secondaryLocation'), 'failoverPriority', 1, 'isZoneRedundant', false())), createArray()))]

notes.value: [format('Prevent accidental deletion of {0} resource group', parameters('environment'))]

notes.defaultValue: Prevent accidental deletion of production resources
